summary: Phenomenal matrix mix delivers crystal‑clear sound for a top‑rated show.
review: Both reviewers give this recording five stars, highlighting the custom audience‑plus‑soundboard (matrix) blend as phenomenal. While no specific musical moments are mentioned, the enthusiasm suggests the performance lives up to the high‑quality audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently perfect (5‑star) reviews praising an excellent matrix recording; lack of negative comments and strong enthusiasm justify a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Custom mix of audience and soundboard described as phenomenal; no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or individual performances.
